title: 5 money moves that made this 32-year-old dad a millionaire in just 9 years
summary: Blake Edwards and his wife overcame a low starting salary, pandemic impacts, housing affordability challenges, graduate school debt, and raising two children to accumulate $1 million by their early 30s. Their story highlights practical financial strategies executed despite significant life obstacles.
content: A low starting salary, global pandemic, unaffordable housing market, graduate school and two kids didn’t stop Blake Edwards and his wife from becoming millionaires by their early 30s.

zh.title: 让这位32岁的父亲在短短9年内成为百万富翁的5个财务举措
zh.summary: Blake Edwards和他的妻子克服了低起薪、疫情影响、住房可负担性挑战、研究生债务和养育两个孩子的困难，在30多岁时积累了100万美元。他们的故事突出了在面对重大生活障碍的情况下执行的实际财务策略。

title: Inflation will likely be higher for longer. Your retirement plan isn’t built for that.
summary: Inflation in healthcare, insurance, and energy remains elevated despite moderate official CPI figures, masking underlying price pressures. Many retirement portfolios rely on outdated assumptions that fail to account for prolonged higher inflation, quietly eroding savings over time.
content: Official CPI masks double-digit spikes in healthcare, insurance and energy. Meanwhile, an outdated strategy quietly drains your portfolio.

zh.title: 通货膨胀可能会持续更长时间。你的退休计划没有为此做好准备。
zh.summary: 尽管官方CPI数字温和，但医疗保健、保险和能源领域的通货膨胀仍然居高不下，掩盖了潜在的价格压力。许多退休投资组合依赖于过时的假设，无法考虑长期的高通胀，悄悄地侵蚀储蓄。

title: China signals tariff cuts, advances in farm market access after Trump-Xi summit
summary: Following the Trump-Xi summit, Beijing and Washington have agreed to expand agricultural trade through mutual tariff reductions. The agreement represents tangible progress in trade negotiations between the world's two largest economies.
content: Beijing and the U.S. have agreed to expand agricultural trade through tariff reductions, China's commerce ministry said.

zh.title: 特朗普-习近平峰会后，中国释放关税削减信号，农业市场准入取得进展
zh.summary: 特朗普-习近平峰会后，北京和华盛顿同意通过相互关税削减来扩大农业贸易。该协议代表了全球两个最大经济体贸易谈判的实质性进展。

title: April’s inflation spike leaves Warsh and the Fed zero excuses not to raise rates
summary: April's inflation data has strengthened the case for Federal Reserve rate increases, according to Fed official Kevin Warsh. Bond markets are already pricing in expectations of higher rates as inflation concerns intensify.
content: Bond markets won’t wait for the central bank to combat inflation.

zh.title: 四月通胀飙升 沃什和美联储再无借口不加息
zh.summary: 据美联储官员凯文·沃什表示,四月的通胀数据加强了美联储加息的理由。债券市场已经反映了对更高利率的预期,因为通胀担忧加剧。

title: AI investment ‘advice’ is 50% more likely to pump you up — and trip you into costly blunders
summary: AI-driven investment recommendations are significantly more likely to encourage impulsive trading and costly mistakes compared to human advisors. Working with human financial coaches can help investors avoid behavioral pitfalls amplified by AI-generated guidance.
content: AI fuels impulsive actions — a human ‘defense coach’ is your best bet to win the market’s ‘loser’s game.’

zh.title: AI投资建议让你冲动交易的概率高50% 导致代价高昂的错误
zh.summary: 与人类顾问相比,AI驱动的投资建议明显更容易鼓励冲动交易和成本高昂的错误。与人类财务顾问合作可以帮助投资者避免AI生成建议放大的行为陷阱。

title: I have $310,000 in cash from a maturing CD. Where should I put it next?
summary: A wave of maturing certificates of deposit is forcing savers to grapple with redeploying substantial cash reserves in the current economic environment. Financial planners are addressing strategies for repositioning funds following extended periods of low-interest CD investments.
content: A “tsunami” of CDs coming due is vexing savers who are worried about redeploying their money.

zh.title: 我有310,000美元的定期存单到期现金。应该投入哪里?
zh.summary: 大量定期存单到期迫使储户在当前经济环境中重新部署大量现金储备。财务规划师正在制定策略,帮助投资者在低利息定期存单投资期满后重新配置资金。

title: The Iran war could be a $300 billion shock — driving up mortgage rates and squeezing wages
summary: A potential Iran conflict could trigger $300 billion in economic disruption, with cascading effects on mortgage rates and worker wages. The Trump administration and Congress are urged to take preventive action to mitigate energy costs and preserve affordability.
content: The Trump administration and Congress can act now to bring down energy costs and make Americans’ lives more affordable.

zh.title: 伊朗战争可能造成3000亿美元经济冲击——推高抵押贷款利率并压低工资
zh.summary: 潜在的伊朗冲突可能引发3000亿美元的经济中断，对抵押贷款利率和工人工资造成连锁影响。特朗普政府和国会被敦促采取预防措施，以缓解能源成本并维持可负担性。

title: ‘She is very angry with me’: My daughter, 30, has issues with drugs. Should I take half the profit from the sale of her house?
summary: A parent is considering claiming half of their adult daughter's home sale proceeds to invest on her behalf, citing concerns about substance abuse and future security. The dilemma highlights the ethical and practical complexities of parental financial intervention in adult children's lives.
content: “My thought is to invest it on her behalf for someday, when she gets her life together.”

zh.title: "她对我很生气"：我30岁的女儿有毒品问题。我应该拿走她房屋出售利润的一半吗？
zh.summary: 一位家长考虑是否应该拿走成年女儿房产出售收益的一半，以代其进行投资管理，理由是担心其滥用药物和未来安全。这个困境突显了家长在成年子女财务事务中进行干预的伦理和实际复杂性。

title: Few Americans can afford long-term care — but this state program could be a game changer
summary: Washington state has launched a program providing all workers access to $36,500 in long-term care benefits through earned contributions. The initiative addresses a critical gap where most Americans lack adequate resources to cover extended care costs.
content: Washington state has embarked on a bold experiment that bolsters families by giving all workers a way to earn access to $36,500 worth of long-term care when they need it.

zh.title: 很少有美国人能负担得起长期护理——但这个州计划可能改变游戏规则
zh.summary: 华盛顿州推出了一项计划，为所有员工提供通过自己的缴款获得36,500美元长期护理福利的机会。该举措解决了一个重大空白，即大多数美国人缺乏足够资源来支付长期护理费用。

title: Meet the Nvidias of power — 5 stocks winning Big Tech’s $700 billion AI energy grab
summary: Energy and power infrastructure companies like GE Vernova and Bloom Energy are emerging as critical service providers controlling grid access as Big Tech invests heavily in AI infrastructure. These firms are positioned to capture significant value from an estimated $700 billion AI energy expansion.
content: Infrastructure giants such as GE Vernova and Bloom Energy are the new gatekeepers of the AI grid.

zh.title: 遇见电力行业的英伟达——赢得科技巨头7000亿美元AI能源投资的5只股票
zh.summary: 随着科技巨头大举投资AI基础设施，GE Vernova和Bloom Energy等能源和电力基础设施公司正成为控制电网接入的关键服务提供商。这些公司有望从估计的7000亿美元AI能源扩张中获得巨大价值。

title: The real cost of the Iran war isn’t higher prices — it’s market paralysis
summary: While rising energy prices from an Iran conflict would be manageable for markets, broader uncertainty and investment paralysis pose a greater threat to economic confidence. Market stability depends more on predictability than on absolute price levels.
content: Markets can handle rising prices. What crushes confidence is uncertainty that squelches investment.

zh.title: 伊朗战争的真实成本不是更高的价格——而是市场瘫痪
zh.summary: 虽然伊朗冲突导致的能源价格上升对市场来说是可控的，但更广泛的不确定性和投资瘫痪对经济信心构成更大威胁。市场稳定性更多取决于可预测性而不是绝对价格水平。

title: Trump says Xi agrees Iran must open strait, but no sign China will weigh in
summary: President Trump claims Chinese leader Xi Jinping agreed that Iran should reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a critical shipping passage. However, there is limited evidence China will actively support or enforce such measures.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump said Chinese President Xi Jinping had agreed Tehran must reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 特朗普称习近平同意伊朗必须开放海峡，但没有迹象表明中国会插手
zh.summary: 特朗普总统声称中国领导人习近平同意伊朗应该重新开放霍尔木兹海峡这一关键航道。然而，几乎没有证据表明中国会积极支持或执行此类措施。

title: Tesla raises prices of Model Y cars in the US for the first time in two years
summary: Tesla has increased prices for its Model Y vehicles in the United States, marking the first price adjustment in two years. The move reflects shifts in Tesla's pricing strategy amid changing market conditions.
content: Tesla raised the prices of its Model Y ⁠cars in the United States on ​Saturday.

zh.title: 特斯拉两年来首次提高美国Model Y车型价格
zh.summary: 特斯拉提高了美国地区Model Y车型的价格，这是两年来首次调整价格。此举反映了特斯拉在不断变化的市场条件下定价策略的转变。

title: The bond market is flashing a warning over Iran. A veteran of energy geopolitics explains the risk
summary: Bond market movements are signaling investor concerns about potential economic disruption from Iran-related geopolitical tensions. An expert in energy geopolitics provides analysis of the potential market and economic risks ahead.
content: Daleep Singh knows how energy and markets intersect. He sees trouble ahead.

zh.title: 债券市场发出伊朗警告 能源地缘政治资深人士解释其风险
zh.summary: 债券市场走势反映了投资者对伊朗相关地缘政治紧张局势可能造成经济中断的担忧。能源地缘政治专家对潜在的市场和经济风险进行了分析。

title: Kevin Warsh comes into the Fed facing a big 'family fight' over cutting interest rates
summary: Federal Reserve official Kevin Warsh faces internal disagreement about interest rate policy amid rising inflation and surging Treasury yields. The Fed committee appears unlikely to support interest rate cuts given current economic pressures.
content: With inflation spiking and Treasury yields surging, Warsh is likely to confront a Federal Open Market Committee in no mood to ease.

zh.title: 凯文·沃什在美联储面临关于降息的大"分歧"
zh.summary: 美联储官员凯文·沃什在通胀上升和美国国债收益率飙升的背景下，面临关于利率政策的内部分歧。在目前经济压力下，美联储委员会似乎不太可能支持降息。

title: A state banquet, selfies with Musk and Huang's noodle run: The spectacle of Trump's Beijing visit
summary: Trump's Beijing visit featured diplomatic pageantry, business discussions, and high-profile moments including meetings with prominent business figures. The visit highlighted efforts at strategic engagement while generating media attention through celebrity-adjacent events.
content: The visit was full of friendly overtures, orchestrated pageantry, business dealmaking, and headline-grabbing sideshows.

zh.title: 国宴、与马斯克自拍和黄仁勋的面条之行：特朗普北京访问的壮观场景
zh.summary: 特朗普的北京访问展现了外交仪式、商务讨论和高调时刻，包括与杰出商界人士的会晤。此次访问强调了战略接触的努力，同时通过名人相关活动产生了媒体关注。

title: ‘He is retired’: Should my husband take his Social Security at 62 and invest it?
summary: This personal finance piece examines the decision of when to claim Social Security benefits, weighing early claiming at 62 against delaying for larger future payments. The article explores the trade-offs between immediate income and long-term retirement income optimization.
content: “His Social Security benefit would be $1,600 per month, since he stayed home with the kids while I worked.”

zh.title: "他已经退休了"：我丈夫应该在62岁时领取社会保障金并投资吗？
zh.summary: 这篇个人财务文章探讨了何时申请社会保障福利的决定，权衡62岁提前申请与推迟以获得更大未来支付之间的取舍。文章探讨了立即收入和长期退休收入优化之间的权衡。

title: Bill Ackman built Microsoft stake in first quarter during sell-off, betting on AI and cloud growth
summary: Billionaire hedge fund manager Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital built a position in Microsoft during market weakness, signaling confidence in the tech giant's AI and cloud computing prospects. The move reflects investor optimism about Microsoft's competitive position in key growth sectors.
content: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management has built a position in Microsoft, the billionaire hedge fund manager said Friday in a post on X.

zh.title: 比尔·阿克曼在第一季度下跌期间建立微软股份，押注人工智能和云增长
zh.summary: 亿万富豪对冲基金经理比尔·阿克曼的Pershing Square Capital在市场疲弱期间建立了微软头寸，表明对这家科技巨头人工智能和云计算前景的信心。此举反映了投资者对微软在关键增长部门竞争地位的乐观态度。

title: Russia's Putin to meet China's Xi in Beijing from May 19-20, Beijing and Moscow say
summary: Russian President Putin will visit Beijing to meet with Chinese President Xi in May, part of broader diplomatic engagement between the two nations. The visit comes shortly after U.S. President Trump's own Beijing trip, marking a significant geopolitical moment.
content: Putin's trip follows shortly after U.S. President Donald Trump's visit to Beijing.

zh.title: 俄罗斯普京将于5月19日至20日在北京与中国习近平会面，北京和莫斯科表示
zh.summary: 俄罗斯总统普京将访问北京与中国主席习近平会面，这是两国更广泛外交接触的一部分。这次访问发生在美国总统特朗普自己访问北京之后不久，标志着一个重要的地缘政治时刻。

title: ‘I nearly made a major misstep’: I claimed my Social Security benefits at 64 instead of 70. Here’s why.
summary: A retiree shares their experience claiming Social Security at 64 rather than waiting until 70, illustrating the complexity of retirement income decisions. The story highlights how many people struggle to optimize their financial planning despite the long-term consequences.
content: “It’s remarkable — and discouraging — how many people are disengaged from their own financial lives.”

zh.title: "我差点犯了一个大错"：我在64岁而非70岁时申请了社会保险福利。原因如下
zh.summary: 一位退休人员分享了在64岁而非等到70岁时申请社会保险的经历，说明了退休收入决定的复杂性。这个故事突出了许多人尽管存在长期后果，仍然很难优化他们的财务规划。

title: Why Taiwan became the defining issue in the Trump-Xi talks
summary: Taiwan was a central focus of discussions between Trump and Xi Jinping, with U.S. arms sales to the island nation featuring prominently in their talks. The island's status remains a critical point of tension in U.S.-China relations.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump had said arms sales to Taiwan would be on the agenda for his talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping which ended Friday.

zh.title: 为什么台湾成为特朗普-习近平谈话中的决定性议题
zh.summary: 台湾是特朗普和习近平之间讨论的中心焦点，美国对该岛国的军售在他们的谈话中占据重要地位。该岛的地位仍然是美中关系中一个关键的紧张点。

title: My husband took out a $100,000 Parent PLUS loan for his daughter. She dropped out, citing mental-health issues. Should we refinance?
summary: A parent faces financial hardship after borrowing $100,000 through Parent PLUS loans for their daughter's education, which she abandoned due to mental health concerns. The family now confronts limited options for managing substantial debt with minimal prospects for repayment.
content: “There is little to no chance that she will ever be able to repay these loans.”

zh.title: 丈夫为女儿贷款10万美元，女儿因心理健康问题退学，我们应该重新融资吗?
zh.summary: 一位家长在为女儿教育借入10万美元的Parent PLUS贷款后面临财务困难，而她的女儿因心理健康问题放弃了学业。这个家庭现在面临有限的债务管理选择，几乎没有还款前景。

title: FDA shuffles top drug, biologics leaders in latest shakeup
summary: The FDA is reorganizing its top leadership in drug and biologics regulation following the recent departure of former commissioner Marty Makary. This leadership transition signals potential policy shifts in how the agency regulates pharmaceutical and biologics development.
content: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration is shuffling its top drug and biologics regulators, days after the departure of former commissioner Marty Makary.

zh.title: FDA在最新改组中调整药物和生物制剂领导层
zh.summary: FDA在前任主任Marty Makary最近离职后，正在重组其药物和生物制剂监管的最高领导层。这次领导层过渡表明该机构在如何监管药物和生物制剂开发方面可能出现政策转变。
